# Project Configuration

<!-- Auto-generated by /ccfold. Manual edits are preserved on re-fold. -->

## Platform
- **Host:** GitHub
- **CLI:** gh
- **Remote:** git@github.com:Wave-Engineering/mcp-server-discord-watcher.git

## Branching
- **Default branch:** main
- **Merge strategy:** squash

## Status Mechanism
- **Type:** GitHub native (issue open/closed)
- **Agent instruction:** Close linked issues on merge via `gh issue close` — do not rely solely on `Closes #N` auto-close.

## Existing Labels
<!-- Labels in use on this repo — do not conflict -->

Default GitHub label set (no custom taxonomy yet):
- `bug` — Something isn't working
- `documentation` — Improvements or additions to documentation
- `duplicate` — This issue or pull request already exists
- `enhancement` — New feature or request
- `good first issue` — Good for newcomers
- `help wanted` — Extra attention is needed
- `invalid` — This doesn't seem right
- `question` — Further information is requested
- `wontfix` — This will not be worked on

## Toolchain
- **Runtime:** Bun
- **Language:** TypeScript (strict)
- **Validation:** `./scripts/ci/validate.sh`
- **Tests:** `./scripts/ci/test.sh` (or `bun test`)
- **Build:** `./scripts/ci/build.sh` (or `bun run build`)
- **Lint:** `./scripts/ci/lint.sh` (or `bun run lint` → `bunx tsc --noEmit`)
- **Release:** `./scripts/ci/release.sh`
- **Shell scripts:** `shellcheck`

## CI
- **System:** GitHub Actions
- **Config:** `.github/workflows/ci.yml`, `.github/workflows/release.yml`
